name: abilityai
description: High-quality Claude Code plugins from Ability.ai - productivity tools, workflow automation, and agent orchestration

plugins.name: trinity-onboard
plugins.description: Onboard agents to Trinity, sync credentials, create scheduled tasks, and fork agents to client repositories

plugins.name: playbook-builder
plugins.description: Create structured, transactional playbooks with state management for autonomous, gated, or manual execution

plugins.name: file-indexing
plugins.description: File system indexing for workspace awareness - creates and maintains a searchable file index

plugins.name: brain-memory
plugins.description: Zettelkasten-style knowledge management - atomic notes with connections and semantic search

plugins.name: json-memory
plugins.description: Structured JSON memory system with efficient jq-based updates and action logging

plugins.name: workspace-kit
plugins.description: Workspace scaffolding - organized folders, indexes, and templates for multi-session work

plugins.name: project-planner
plugins.description: Plan and execute large multi-session projects with scope analysis, session splitting, and state tracking

plugins.name: utilities
plugins.description: General-purpose utility skills for conversation management, ops workflows, and agent productivity

plugins.name: agent-builder
plugins.description: Scaffold a new Trinity-compatible Claude Code agent from scratch on any topic — creates directory, CLAUDE.md, initial skills, and Trinity files ready for development

plugins.name: install-cornelius
plugins.description: Clone the Cornelius agent repository and launch Claude Code inside it

plugins.name: website-builder
plugins.description: Scaffold complete, production-ready Next.js 15 websites deployable to Vercel in minutes — with design system, components, pages, SEO, and content management

plugins.name: dev-methodology
plugins.description: Documentation-driven development methodology with skills, agents, and project memory templates. Enforces a 5-phase development cycle: context loading, development, testing, documentation, and PR validation.
